prompt: Square 1:1 editorial wellness lifestyle photograph in a bright minimalist studio with cream-white walls and a cream-white floor. A young woman in matching cream-colored loose loungewear top and pants kneeling forward in a gentle yoga preparation, framed in profile from the side. Soft warm window light from the left. Slight Dutch tilt ~5-8 degrees clockwise. CAMERA-IN-MOTION motion blur permeates the entire frame as if the photographer is mid-pan with a slow shutter — soft directional blur across the background and the figure's silhouette, subtle softness throughout, nothing tack-sharp. Documentary photojournalism aesthetic, painterly soft lighting, warm cream tones, fine Cinestill 35mm grain, subtle halation. No text, no logos.
